instances.task_instruction:
You are solving a course scheduling task. Fill the 5x2 grid with course ids.
This course scheduling plan has 5 scheduling days as rows and 2 class time slots per day as columns.
Each cell must use exactly one candidate id from that slot.

Across the whole grid, the plan must satisfy these global constraints:
(1) the total credits of all courses in the whole grid must be at least 20.
(2) the total price of all courses in the whole grid must be at most 3908.
(3) the same teacher can appear at most 2 times in the whole grid.
(4) the same category can appear at most 4 times in the whole grid.

For the row constraints:
For day 0:
(1) the total credits of all courses in day 0 must be at least 1.
(2) the total price of all courses in day 0 must be at most 666.
(3) the maximum difficulty of any course in day 0 must be at most 5.

For day 1:
(1) the total credits of all courses in day 1 must be at least 6.
(2) the total price of all courses in day 1 must be at most 680.
(3) the maximum difficulty of any course in day 1 must be at most 2.

For day 2:
(1) the total credits of all courses in day 2 must be at least 5.
(2) the total price of all courses in day 2 must be at most 732.
(3) the maximum difficulty of any course in day 2 must be at most 5.

For day 3:
(1) the total credits of all courses in day 3 must be at least 2.
(2) the total price of all courses in day 3 must be at most 948.
(3) the maximum difficulty of any course in day 3 must be at most 5.

For day 4:
(1) the total credits of all courses in day 4 must be at least 4.
(2) the total price of all courses in day 4 must be at most 614.
(3) the maximum difficulty of any course in day 4 must be at most 4.

For the column constraints:
For time slot 0:
(1) the total credits of all courses in time slot 0 must be at least 10.
(2) the total price of all courses in time slot 0 must be at most 1440.
(3) the maximum workload of any course in time slot 0 must be at most 8.

For time slot 1:
(1) the total credits of all courses in time slot 1 must be at least 11.
(2) the total price of all courses in time slot 1 must be at most 1930.
(3) the maximum workload of any course in time slot 1 must be at most 7.

Each slot also has its own local constraints, but those slot-specific limits must be looked up from the dataset/database for that slot before deciding which candidate id to use.
Return only a 5x2 list of course ids.
